series_description: Reimbursement backup tapes for A.C. & P.D. are used for the purpose of restoring files to system in case of system failure.

series_description: Form No. OPD-111A. Statement reflects the total number of cases being reimbursed to an individual county.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year after State Auditor's report is released

series_description: Form No. W-4. Shows the amount of money withheld on a calendar year with regard to the employee's federal income tax.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years after superseded or employee concerned is separated or terminated

series_description: Form No. W-4. Law requires employee to complete W-4 form to allow employer to withhold federal income tax from employee's pay.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years after superseded or employee concerned is separated or terminated

series_description: This record series contains all legislation introduced in the House and Senate pertaining to criminal law and procedure.

series_description: Administrative memos files and correspondence that are of no further value or use and have been inactive for sometime.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in operating area until the end of the current fiscal year

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house or off-site for 100 years

series_description: ADMN - 4268 State Applications & Writing Samples
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 6 months

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house or off-site for 100 years

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house or off-site for 100 years

retention_statement: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years

series_description: Formerly FIS-7 (019-0007), FIS-8 (019-0008), and FIS-9 (019-0009). This form prescribed by the State Public Defender (OPD-1026R) and the companion Continuation Sheet (OPD-1027R) is used to document indigent defense counsel appointments, hours, and expens
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years

series_description: Form No. DF-328. To keep record of employees residence, place of employment, municipal limits, post office, etc. To determine municipal tax liability.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain one copy of each county's current version and all previously submitted version(s) of resolutions or fee schedules in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently.

retention_statement: Electronic: Retain information in database until 2 years after equipment is retired and audit conducted by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: This record series shows all receipts from post office with regard to postage meter account, bulk rate account, etc., information contained within gives date, amount of postage, amount of items being sent, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) fiscal years

retention_statement: Paper: Permanent

retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house of off-site for 100 years

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house of off-site for 100 years

retention_statement: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on- site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years

series_description: Form No. IT-04 (1-75). Form authorizing state to withhold a portion of the employee's income for the payment of state income tax.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years after superseded or employee concerned is separated or terminated;

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in house of off-site for 100 years

retention_statement: Paper: Retain records in operating area through the current fiscal year plus one fiscal year

retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer created

series_description: A current and consise source of information for criminal defense lawyers in Ohio, containing briefs of the latest unreported appellate opinions, synopsis of legislation concerning criminal laws and procedures, and summaries of the US Supreme Court.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent

series_description: The purpose of this spreadsheet is to show the mileage and gasoline usage on a monthly basis for the vehicles in the possession of the Office of the Ohio Public Defender.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain information in spreadsheet until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: The purpose of this record series is to give reference to equipment contracts, such as lease or lease purchase equipment, service contacts and office equipment etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until contract expires or is superseded

retention_statement: Paper: Retain records in operating area through the current fiscal year plus one fiscal year

series_description: This form, prescribed by the Ohio Public Defender (OPD-E-1031), is used to document Supreme Court indigent representation appointments, hours, and expenses for purposes of obtaining reimbursement from the State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years

series_title: Standards and Guidelines for Appointed C

retention_statement: Paper: Retain one copy of the current version and all previously issued versions in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently.

series_description: Daily record of activity on agency computer system. Used to retrieve documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 28 days off-site.

retention_statement: Paper: Permanent.

series_title: Certificate of Costs of Representation B

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in-house or off-site for 100 years

series_description: Monthly display of records on agency computer system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years off-site

series_title: State Maximum Fee Schedule for Appointed
series_description: Formerly FIS-1 (019-0001). The State Maximum Fee Schedule is promulgated pursuant to Section 120.04 (B)(8-9) of the Ohio Revised Code. The schedule sets the hourly rates and maximum amounts which will be reimbursed to the counties by the Office of the O
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one copy of the current version and all previously issued versions in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain current contracts in the County Reimbursement operating area unless or until a county submits a new contract. Retain previously effective or expired contracts in the County Reimbursement operating area until one year following the State Auditor's report on any and all reimbursement payments affected by the previous version of the contract

series_description: This file consists of the insurance policy covering office equipment, valuable papers such as books, etc., and miscellaneous property.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until contract expires or is superseded

retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after expiration of lease

retention_statement: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years
